name: io.github.psycgod/sage
description: Smart Agent Guidance Engine - CLI wrapper with 97% compression for AI coding agents. Run commands, track history, predict failures, and save tokens.

tools.name: sage_run
tools.description: Run a command with SAGE compression and tracking

tools.name: sage_read_file
tools.description: Read a file with smart compression for large files

tools.name: sage_edit_file
tools.description: Edit a file by replacing exact string matches

tools.name: sage_explain_error
tools.description: Get explanation for a command error

tools.name: sage_suggest_fix
tools.description: Get suggested fix for a failed command

tools.name: sage_spawn_agent
tools.description: Spawn a SAGE agent (code, debug, test, security)
